leadText: Undella Bay (Japanese: サザナミ湾 Sazanami Bay) is a small area in the eastern part of Unova. It is east of Undella Town and is the only way to access the Abyssal Ruins. In Black 2 and White 2, it connects Undella Town to Seaside Cave, which leads to Route 21.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In Black and White , Undella Bay appears on the Town Map as a green dot, like other landmarks, but in Black 2 and White 2 , it appears as a line segment, as if it were a route . Similarly, the Desert Resort also appears as a line segment; however, it is also a line segment in Black and White. Due to a glitch in Black 2 and White 2 , if the player enters the sight range of Ace Trainer Summer from the north while surfing , she will walk over the water to challenge them to a battle.
